trim_reasons: BLOWOUT_RISK at -9.5 spread is the structural concern: even with the elite scorer exemption applied, a decisive fourth quarter leads to reduced crunch-time usage and early benching for a star. The VOLATILE tag means the distribution is wide enough that a garbage-time scenario materially shifts the floor.

Murray is VOLATILE with a FG_COLD flag and overall rate that only barely cleared the T15 bar at 70% — the typical_miss is 5.5 pts below threshold, meaning a cold shooting night drops him well under. The bounce_back lift of +1.12 is positive but post_miss_hr of 84% still means roughly 1-in-6 games he misses again, and the VOLATILE tag makes the distribution wide.

VOLATILE tag with a post_miss_hr of only 69% (lift=0.83, sub-1.0) signals that Banchero is in a slump-persistent pattern for PTS — missing last game makes a miss today meaningfully more likely than the base rate. The FG_MARGIN_THIN fire already stepped the tier down, but the sub-1.0 lift means the bounce-back effect does not help here.

The def_recency flag is 'tough' with a dramatic -10.3% delta (l5 avg 102.2 vs l15 avg 113.9), meaning ORL's defense has tightened sharply in recent games — this is the most severe recency tightening on the slate. VOLATILE + AST T6+ at 72% confidence against a defense trending hard toward tough creates real fragility for a pass-first metric.

raw_avg_REB of 5.7 is BELOW the T6 pick threshold — per audit lessons, picking REB from below the player's average places the pick already in the tail of the distribution. Combined with VOLATILE tag and only 72% confidence at the minimum floor, this is structurally the same configuration that produced the Paul George REB T4 miss (raw_avg below pick_value, VOLATILE applied).

Post_miss_hr of only 55% with a sub-1.0 lift (0.64) is the worst bounce-back profile on the slate — Duren is confirmed slump-persistent on REB, meaning a prior miss dramatically increases miss probability today. Series hit rate of only 1/2 at T8 compounds the concern alongside VOLATILE and a def_recency 'tough' flag.

min_floor of 17.9 against an avg of 30.8 is extreme minutes fragility — a single low-minutes game is well within normal variance and would likely produce a miss at T10. VOLATILE tag with post_miss_hr of only 70% (lift=0.93, sub-1.0) adds slump-persistence risk; this is not an elimination game context where min fragility is waived.

BLOWOUT_RISK at -9.5 is extreme, and Holmgren's min_floor of 21.6 against avg 26.9 means Q4 garbage-time benching — a routine outcome in a blowout — directly threatens the minutes needed to accumulate 10 points. The iron_floor and blowout penalty were applied, but the structural rest/garbage-time risk for a non-exempt secondary scorer remains.

min_floor of 0.0 is a severe minutes fragility flag — the 25th percentile of Jalen Green's minutes distribution includes near-zero outliers, meaning a low-minutes game is a realistic scenario. Against a tough OKC defense with post_miss_hr of only 78% and typical_miss of 6 pts below threshold, the floor is genuinely contingent on minutes being delivered.

raw_avg_AST of only 2.3 against a pick threshold of 2 leaves essentially zero margin — VOLATILE tag with post_miss_hr of 67% (lift=0.83, sub-1.0) confirms slump persistence, and a typical miss lands 1 pt below threshold meaning any off night fails. This is the thinnest AST margin on the slate for a volatile player.
